title: potentilla hirta subsp. laeta
intro: Potentilla hirta subsp. laeta is a subspecies of the Potentilla hirta plant, also known as the hairy cinquefoil, a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and astringent, making it useful in treating wounds, skin conditions, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Potentilla hirta subsp. laeta include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, which can help prevent infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
